scripts.build: npm run sync:versions && npm run check:sdk-boundary && npm run check:plugin-ui-hookfree && npm run check:db-find-where && npm run check:appearance-boundary && tsc -b && cp -r packages/api/src/controllers/auth/email-templates/templates packages/api/dist/controllers/auth/email-templates/ && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 npm run build:admin && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:api: npm run sync:versions && npm run build --workspace=@fromcode119/api
scripts.build:admin: npm run sync:versions && npm run build --workspace=@fromcode119/admin
scripts.build:frontend: npm run sync:versions && npm run build --workspace=@fromcode119/frontend
scripts.check:plugin-architecture:phase:finance: ARCH_LEGACY_MODE=error ARCH_LAYER_MODE=error ARCH_SIZE_MODE=error ARCH_ENFORCE_PLUGINS=finance node scripts/check-plugin-architecture.mjs
scripts.check:plugin-architecture:phase:cms: ARCH_LEGACY_MODE=error ARCH_LAYER_MODE=error ARCH_SIZE_MODE=error ARCH_ENFORCE_PLUGINS=finance,cms node scripts/check-plugin-architecture.mjs
scripts.start:all: concurrently "PORT=3000 npm run start --workspace=@fromcode119/api" "PORT=3001 npm run start --workspace=@fromcode119/admin" "PORT=3002 npm run start --workspace=@fromcode119/frontend"
scripts.start:api-admin: concurrently "PORT=3000 npm run start --workspace=@fromcode119/api" "PORT=3001 npm run start --workspace=@fromcode119/admin"
scripts.start:all:test-shared: PLUGINS_DIR='/Users/kristian/Work/Clients/Fromcode 119/Domains/fromcode.com/Source/plugins' THEMES_DIR='/Users/kristian/Work/Clients/Fromcode 119/Domains/fromcode.com/Source/themes' concurrently "PORT=3000 npm run start --workspace=@fromcode119/api" "PORT=3001 npm run start --workspace=@fromcode119/admin" "PORT=3002 npm run start --workspace=@fromcode119/frontend"
scripts.start:api-admin:test-shared: PLUGINS_DIR='/Users/kristian/Work/Clients/Fromcode 119/Domains/fromcode.com/Source/plugins' THEMES_DIR='/Users/kristian/Work/Clients/Fromcode 119/Domains/fromcode.com/Source/themes' concurrently "PORT=3000 npm run start --workspace=@fromcode119/api" "PORT=3001 npm run start --workspace=@fromcode119/admin"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n proxy,api,admin,web -c white,cyan,green,yellow "PROXY_PORT=3000 API_PORT=4000 ADMIN_PORT=3001 FRONTEND_PORT=3002 node starters/local/proxy.js" "PORT=4000 npm run dev --workspace=@fromcode119/api" "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_BASE_PATH=/admin PORT=3001 npm run dev --workspace=@fromcode119/admin" "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 PORT=3002 npm run dev --workspace=@fromcode119/frontend"
scripts.dev:local:api-admin: concurrently -n proxy,api,admin -c white,cyan,green "PROXY_PORT=3000 API_PORT=4000 ADMIN_PORT=3001 node starters/local/proxy.js" "PORT=4000 npm run dev --workspace=@fromcode119/api" "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_BASE_PATH=/admin PORT=3001 npm run dev --workspace=@fromcode119/admin"
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run publish:all
